creator: borich@borich.spb.ru
text:
After upgrade to 14.2-STABLE (notebook Acer V3-772G with Realtek ALC282 audio codec), I tried to remove setting dev.hdac.1.polling=1 from config and soundcard work just fine, no more messages from kernel "pcm0: ...... play interrupt timeout, channel dead". 
I recommend mauro try to remove this setting and check, how sound works, if all will be ok, we may close this bug.
